label: Job giver goto travel destination
description: Directs the pawn to travel to its duty focus position. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

exactCell.label: Exact cell
exactCell.description: If true, the pawn must reach the exact destination cell rather than a nearby cell.

locomotionUrgency.label: Locomotion urgency
locomotionUrgency.description: Movement speed mode used while travelling to the destination.

ritualTagOnArrival.label: Ritual tag on arrival
ritualTagOnArrival.description: Ritual tag assigned to the pawn when it reaches the destination (e.g. Arrived). Not translated.

jobDef.label: Job def
jobDef.description: JobDef given to the pawn on arrival. Uses the engine default (Goto) when absent.

destinationFocusIndex.label: Destination focus index
destinationFocusIndex.description: Which duty focus slot is used as the destination: 1 = focus, 2 = focusSecond, 3 = focusThird.

jobMaxDuration.label: Job max duration
jobMaxDuration.description: Maximum ticks before the travel job expires.
